tagline: Standard dashboard-block chrome — header, overflow menu, built-in states.
whenToUse: Widget is the standard chrome every rearrangeable dashboard block sits in: a titled header with an optional drag handle and an overflow menu (refresh / configure / remove), a body slot, and built-in loading, empty, and error states with retry. Dashboard Layout accepts Widget children in editable mode. Drop content — a Metric Card, a feed, a chart — into its body rather than reinventing the header and states.
